input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[6-10] A blurry transition shifts the view back to a sharp, static close-up of the glistening roasted poultry arranged closely together. [10-14] The scene cuts to raw chicken drumsticks arranged in rows on a light cutting board. A stream of yellow liquid is poured over the pale pink and white poultry, coating the skin and glistening as it covers the pieces.

[14-18] A stream of yellow liquid pours over raw chicken drumsticks arranged in rows on a cutting board, coating the pale skin and pooling at the base. The marinade makes the poultry glisten with visible red specks clinging to the surface.
[18-26] The drumsticks rest stationary, fully coated in the yellowish marinade. A layer of white granular seasoning is sprinkled over the wet surface, creating a textured appearance on the glossy skin. The white powder adheres to the meat, mixing with the pooling liquid and red flakes.
[26-28] Finally, a generous layer of black pepper is sprinkled over the chicken, settling on top of the white seasoning and yellow marinade. Dark granules coat the pale skin. The text "youtube.com/thewolfepit" is visible in the bottom right corner.

[28-32] Raw chicken drumsticks rest on a light cutting board, heavily coated in yellow marinade, white granules, and black pepper, with liquid pooling at the base. A white mist appears on the left. [32-38] A fine white powder settles over the drumsticks, coating the existing spices. The scene remains static, showing the layered seasoning on the pale skin. [38-42] A fresh cloud of white powder is sprinkled over the center, followed by a fine, pale yellow powder that adds another layer to the poultry. The watermark "youtube.com/thewolfepit" remains visible in the bottom right.

recent_thinks: [42-44] A green, flaky seasoning resembling dried herbs is sprinkled over the raw chicken drumsticks. This new layer settles atop the existing coating of yellow marinade, black pepper, and white powders. The green specks distribute across the pale skin and accumulated spices on the light cutting board.

[44-46] The seasoned chicken drumsticks rest on the board, covered in a thick layer of green dried herbs atop the black pepper and white powders. The herbs adhere to the moist skin and pooled yellow marinade, creating a textured surface. The scene remains static with the watermark visible in the corner.

[46-48] The raw chicken drumsticks remain stationary on the cutting board, fully coated in a multi-layered seasoning of marinade, black pepper, powders, and green herbs. The green herbs form the topmost layer, adhering to the glossy, wet skin and pooled liquid. The scene is static with the watermark visible.

[48-50] The raw chicken drumsticks remain stationary on the light cutting board, fully coated in layers of yellow marinade, black pepper, white powder, and green dried herbs. No new ingredients are added, and the scene stays static, displaying the heavily seasoned poultry with the watermark visible in the bottom right corner.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] Static close-ups show roasted chicken legs with golden-brown skin, char marks, and seasoning. The camera zooms out to reveal rows of drumsticks on a light surface. The watermark youtube.com/thewolfepit is visible in the bottom right. [6-10] A blurry transition shifts the view back to a sharp, static close-up of the glistening roasted poultry arranged closely together. [10-14] The scene cuts to raw chicken drumsticks arranged in rows on a light cutting board. A stream of yellow liquid is poured over the pale pink and white poultry, coating the skin and glistening as it covers the pieces. [14-18] A stream of yellow liquid pours over raw chicken drumsticks arranged in rows on a cutting board, coating the pale skin and pooling at the base. The marinade makes the poultry glisten with visible red specks clinging to the surface. [18-26] The drumsticks rest stationary, fully coated in the yellowish marinade. A layer of white granular seasoning is sprinkled over the wet surface, creating a textured appearance on the glossy skin. The white powder adheres to the meat, mixing with the pooling liquid and red flakes. [26-28] Finally, a generous layer of black pepper is sprinkled over the chicken, settling on top

[124-126] Eleven seasoned chicken drumsticks sit stationary in two staggered rows on a metal grill grate as faint smoke rises. [126-130] Silver metal tongs enter, gripping the bone end of a left-side drumstick to shift it slightly before lifting and turning pieces on the left. [130-134] A hand wielding the tongs maneuvers poultry in the front and middle rows, repositioning them on the hot bars. [134-138] The tool continues turning drumsticks, including one on the right, revealing browned, spice-coated skin while smoke persists. The watermark "youtube.com/thewolfepit" is visible in the bottom right corner throughout the sequence.

[138-142] Silver metal tongs grip and rotate a seasoned chicken drumstick on the right side of the grill grate, revealing golden-brown, spice-coated skin, before releasing the poultry and exiting the frame to the right. [142-144] Eleven seasoned drumsticks rest stationary in staggered rows on the dark metal bars while faint smoke rises; the watermark youtube.com/thewolfepit is visible in the bottom right. [144-150] The tongs return to grip the bone end of the far right drumstick, rotating and adjusting its position on the grate while other pieces remain stationary and smoke continues to rise.

[150-154] Silver metal tongs maintain a grip on the bone end of a seasoned chicken drumstick positioned on the far right side of the grill grate, holding it steady while faint smoke rises, before releasing the piece and exiting the frame to the right. [154-162] Eleven golden-brown poultry pieces remain arranged in staggered rows on the dark grill grate. The chicken drumsticks feature spice-coated skin with visible char marks. Faint smoke continues to rise gently from the cooking meat, surrounding the pieces. The scene remains static with the watermark "youtube.com/thewolfepit" visible in the bottom right corner throughout the duration.

[162-164] The view transitions to a wooden table displaying cooked drumsticks on a light green oval platter. A license plate sign reading "THE WOLFE PIT" stands against a wooden fence behind the food, with the watermark "youtube.com/thewolfepit" visible. [164-168] A hand enters from the right, reaching toward the platter and grasping the bone of a drumstick on the far right. [168-174] The hand lifts the golden-brown, seasoned drumstick close to the camera, rotating it to showcase the skin texture while the remaining poultry rests on the plate below. [174-176] The view blurs briefly then settles on the static platter of chicken legs on the table, with the hand removed and the background sign still visible.

recent_thinks: [176-178] A hand holds a cooked chicken drumstick close to the lens, displaying the exposed white interior meat and juices. The golden-brown skin remains on the lower portion. Behind the hand, the remaining poultry rests on a light green oval platter on a wooden surface beneath the license plate sign.

[178-180] The hand rotates the held drumstick slightly, emphasizing the tender texture of the white meat pulling away from the bone. The golden-brown skin remains intact at the base. Below, the green platter filled with roasted poultry sits on the wooden table, with the license plate sign visible in the background.

[180-182] The hand holds the drumstick steady, displaying the pulled-back white meat and exposed bone. The golden-brown skin remains intact at the base. Below, the light green platter with roasted poultry rests on the wooden table beneath the license plate sign reading THE WOLFE PIT.

[182-184] The hand holds the drumstick steady, displaying exposed white meat and bone where the skin is pulled back. Golden-brown skin remains at the base. Below, the light green platter with roasted poultry rests on the wooden table beneath the license plate sign reading THE WOLFE PIT.

[184-186] A hand holds a cooked chicken drumstick steady near the camera, displaying the exposed white interior meat and bone where the skin has been pulled back. The golden-brown skin remains intact at the base. Below, a light green oval platter filled with roasted poultry rests on a wooden table beneath a license plate sign.

[[18, 20]] The raw chicken drumsticks remain stationary on the light cutting board, fully coated in the yellowish marinade with visible red specks. [6-10] A blurry transition shifts the view back to a sharp, static close-up of the glistening roasted poultry arranged closely together. [10-14] The scene cuts to raw chicken drumsticks arranged in rows on a light cutting board. A stream of yellow liquid is poured over the pale pink and white poultry, coating the skin and glistening as it covers the pieces.

[14-18] A stream of yellow liquid pours over raw chicken drumsticks arranged in rows on a cutting board, coating the pale skin and pooling at the base. The marinade makes the poultry glisten with visible red specks clinging to the surface.
[18-26] The drumsticks rest stationary, fully coated in the yellowish marinade. A layer of white granular seasoning is sprinkled over the wet surface, creating a textured appearance on the glossy skin. The white powder adheres to the meat, mixing with the pooling liquid and red flakes.
[26-28] Finally, a generous layer of black pepper is sprinkled over the chicken, settling on top of the white seasoning and yellow marinade. Dark granules coat the pale skin. The text "youtube.com/thewolfepit" is visible in the bottom right corner.

recent_thinks: [28-30] The raw chicken drumsticks rest on the cutting board, coated in yellow marinade, white granules, and black pepper. The seasoned liquid pools around the base. The scene remains static, displaying the fully seasoned poultry with no new ingredients added. The black pepper covers the surface of the drumsticks.

[30-32] The seasoned raw chicken drumsticks remain stationary on the cutting board, heavily coated in yellow marinade, white granules, and black pepper. A distinct white mist or vapor appears on the left side, rising slightly over the poultry. The text watermark remains visible in the bottom right corner throughout the static shot.

[32-34] A fine white powder settles over the raw chicken drumsticks, thoroughly coating the black pepper and yellow marinade beneath. The white dust layers atop existing spices on the pale skin, visible across the poultry arranged on the light cutting board. The text watermark is visible in the bottom right corner.

[34-36] The seasoned raw chicken drumsticks rest motionless on the cutting board, covered in yellow marinade, black pepper, and a dusting of white powder. The spices adhere to the pale skin and mix with the pooling liquid at the base. The scene remains static, showing the fully prepared poultry with the watermark visible in the bottom right corner.

[36-38] The raw chicken drumsticks rest motionless on the cutting board, covered in layers of yellow marinade, black pepper, and white seasoning powder. The scene remains static with no new actions or ingredients introduced. The watermark text is visible in the bottom right corner against the light wooden surface.

queries.question: Which watermark URL text appears during the first 2 seconds of the video? A. youtube.com/thewolfepit B. youtube.com/thecollepit C. youtube.com/thewolfgang D. youtube.com/thevoltepit

samples.output: <think>A fresh cloud of fine white powder is actively sprinkled over the center raw chicken drumsticks. The white dust falls onto the existing layers of black pepper and yellow marinade, lightly coating the pale skin and adding to the accumulated seasoning on the cutting board surface. The powder creates a hazy effect over the meat.</think><answer></answer>

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] Static close-ups show roasted chicken legs with golden-brown skin, char marks, and seasoning. The camera zooms out to reveal rows of drumsticks on a light surface. The watermark youtube.com/thewolfepit is visible in the bottom right. [6-10] A blurry transition shifts the view back to a sharp, static close-up of the glistening roasted poultry arranged closely together. [10-14] The scene cuts to raw chicken drumsticks arranged in rows on a light cutting board. A stream of yellow liquid is poured over the pale pink and white poultry, coating the skin and glistening as it covers the pieces. [14-18] A stream of yellow liquid pours over raw chicken drumsticks arranged in rows on a cutting board, coating the pale skin and pooling at the base. The marinade makes the poultry glisten with visible red specks clinging to the surface. [18-26] The drumsticks rest stationary, fully coated in the yellowish marinade. A layer of white granular seasoning is sprinkled over the wet surface, creating a textured appearance on the glossy skin. The white powder adheres to the meat, mixing with the pooling liquid and red flakes. [26-28] Finally, a generous layer of black pepper is sprinkled over the chicken, settling on top

[82-96] Metal tongs continuously grip and turn seasoned chicken drumsticks within a container, rearranging the jumbled pile of poultry pieces. The drumsticks are thoroughly coated in a dark, wet marinade with visible spices, glistening as the tool maneuvers the meat through the liquid mixture pooled at the bottom. The tongs lift and shift individual drumsticks among the others resting in the seasoning, ensuring even coverage on the pale skin. Throughout the sequence, the brownish spice mixture coats the meat as the arrangement shifts slightly. The tongs adjust the position of the marinated chicken, turning pieces over to maintain the coating. The watermark "youtube.com/thewolfpit" remains visible in the bottom right corner as the manipulation continues. The poultry pieces remain submerged in the pooled liquid at the bottom, glistening with spices as the tongs work to ensure thorough coverage of the seasoning mixture.

[96-98] Metal tongs complete the arrangement of six seasoned chicken drumsticks on the grill grate. Smoke or steam rises from the cooking meat as the tongs exit the frame.

[108-110] Eight seasoned chicken drumsticks now rest on the metal grill grate, arranged in two staggered rows. The watermark youtube.com/thewolfepit is visible in the bottom right corner throughout.

[110-114] Silver metal tongs place a seasoned chicken drumstick onto the grill alongside eight others, bringing the count to nine. [120-124] The tool adjusts a piece on the left before exiting, leaving eleven drumsticks cooking on the grate with faint smoke rising. The watermark youtube.com/thewolfepit is visible.

[124-126] Eleven seasoned chicken drumsticks sit stationary in two staggered rows on a metal grill grate as faint smoke rises. [126-130] Silver metal tongs enter, gripping the bone end of a left-side drumstick to shift it slightly before lifting and turning pieces on the left. [130-134] A hand wielding the tongs maneuvers poultry in the front and middle rows, repositioning them on the hot bars. [134-138] The tool continues turning drumsticks, including one on the right, revealing browned, spice-coated skin while smoke persists. The watermark "youtube.com/thewolfepit" is visible in the bottom right corner throughout the sequence.
